title: cremanthodium obovatum
intro: Cremanthodium obovatum, also known as the 'Mountain Sneezeweed', is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cremanthodium obovatum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and aid in digestion. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
